description: Cockpit action feedback and native-dialog replacement. Core actions fail silently (catch to console.error only): PipelineView approve/reject (PipelineView.jsx:49-66), TemplateSelector draft create (:38-43), DocsView save (:272), OpenLoops add/resolve, ItemDetail kill (:772), stop-agent (App.jsx:702). Two actions use blocking native dialogs: Feature Design start uses window.prompt (DesignView.jsx:93) and loop resolve uses window.prompt (OpenLoopsPanel.jsx:209). Add a general toast/banner system (desktop has only GateNotificationBar; mobile already ships a Toast) and replace native prompt/confirm with in-app modals.
